sub_mechanisms: M_1: compute Laplacian eigenvalues of attention-graph at each layer (spectral side)
M_2: compute token-path-length estimator (geometric side analog)
M_3: parametric identity-test between spectral and geometric sides
M_4: hallucination flag when sides diverge beyond threshold
stripped_llm_application: Compute attention-graph Laplacian eigenvalues at each layer (spectral side); compute token-path-length estimator over closed paths (geometric side analog); test a parametric identity between the two; flag hallucination when sides diverge.
novelty_claim_stripped: LapEigvals and EigenTrack use ONLY the spectral side; the trace-formula adds a parallel GEOMETRIC side and tests identity divergence as anomaly signal.
